start.welcome: Hello, {first_name}! Choose a section from the main menu.
help.text: This bot helps you manage your personal networking database: people profiles, relationships, birthday reminders, backup, and Excel import/export. Available commands: /start, /help, /language, /add, /list, /search, /view, /edit, /delete, /relationships, /add_child, /birthdays, /settings, /cancel.
person.ask_category: Which group does this person belong to?
person.ask_note: Would you like to add a short note?
person.ask_relationship_offer: Would you like to link this person to another person in the relationships section?
person.search_empty: Nothing found for this search query.
person.select_field: Select a field to edit for {full_name}.
person.delete_confirm: Soft delete {full_name}? Active relationships connected to this person will also be soft deleted, and reminders will be disabled.
person.relationship_offer_after_save: To add a relationship, use the “Add relationship” button in the person profile or the /relationships command.
person.relationships_placeholder: Relationships: will be added in part 3.
person.add_child_placeholder: Add child flow will be connected in part 3.
relationship.menu: Relationships section. Choose whether to create a new relationship or view existing relationships.
relationship.self_not_allowed: A person cannot have a relationship with themselves.
relationship.person_not_found: Selected person was not found or does not belong to you.
child.select_parent: Select the parent person to add a child.
child.ask_note: Any short note about the child?
child.created: {child_full_name} was created as a separate person and linked to {parent_full_name} with a parent-child relationship.
settings.invalid_time: Invalid time. Use HH:MM format, for example 09:00.
settings.invalid_timezone: Invalid timezone. Use IANA format, for example Asia/Tashkent.
settings.invalid_days_before: Invalid days before value. Enter a number from 0 to 30.
settings.ask_reminder_time: Enter reminder time in HH:MM format. Example: 09:00
settings.ask_days_before: How many days before the birthday should I remind you? Enter a number from 0 to 30.
backup.auto_failed: Failed to send backup. Your data was saved in the database, but the backup file was not sent.
restore.invalid_file: Invalid backup file. Only a .json file with valid schema_version and checksum is accepted.
excel.file_too_large: File is too large. Maximum size: 5 MB.
excel.no_data: There is no active data to export.
import.errors.INVALID_CHILD_RELATIONSHIP: Parent and child cannot be the same person.
import.errors.FORMULA_NOT_ALLOWED: Formula or formula-like text is not allowed.
admin.forbidden: This command is available only to admins.
security.forbidden: You are not allowed to perform this action.
privacy.delete_my_data_coming_soon: This feature will be added in the next version. For now, use /delete to remove individual records.
error.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
